# Search Intent Capture System

Search is the closest thing to a marketing cheat code because the buyer reveals intent.

## Intent tiers

| Tier | Example | Strategy |
|---|---|---|
| Category | project management software | Category page and comparison. |
| Problem | automate support triage | Pain-to-mechanism page. |
| Competitor | alternative to X | Honest comparison page. |
| Integration | Slack Jira automation | Integration-specific page. |
| Template | support triage template | Lead magnet or product-led asset. |
| Error/workaround | manual invoice reconciliation | Hidden-cost and solution page. |

## Workflow

```text
Collect keywords → cluster by intent → map buyer state → create page → create search ads → create proof asset → track inspection events
```

If search volume exists for a painful problem or competitor alternative, test search before broad cold ads.
